title: Parrot Sit on ArmorStand
description: Make your parrot Sit on the head of the ArmorStand,
body:
It does what the title say
- RightClick to make the parrot on your shoulder Sit on the head of the ArmorStand
- Shift RightClick to unMount  

Other player can unMount the parrot, it will also unMount when the ArmorStand is broken

The idea came from an YouTube Short, not mine
